doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document outlines a regulatory scheme that contradicts existing California statutes regarding the unauthorized practice of law and does not correspond to any official State Bar of California issuance.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document describes a legal scheme that would violate the California Business and Professions Code regarding the unauthorized practice of law, and no such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in State Bar records.
